title: nevroctola
intro_study: According to "Iranian journal of medical sciences", nevroctola benefits include reducing anxiety in patients suffering from depression, with a higher reduction in anxiety scores compared to Sertraline in the 2nd and 4th weeks.
side_effects: Nevroctola can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, it can cause seizures, convulsions, and even respiratory failure. Some users have reported experiencing hallucinations, confusion, and memory loss after ingesting excessive amounts of the plant. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to nevroctola can lead to irreversible damage to the nervous system and other vital organs.
